_schema.purpose: Public per-seat list prices for vendor seat products — the 'buy the seat vs build on the API' comparison (CTO review 2026-07-10 item 4). PUBLIC pricing only; no TAIL data, no provider financials. Rendered only on the seat-shaped use cases named in applies_to.
_schema.verification: Gathered 2026-07-10. status on each entry records HOW it was verified: 'official' = read directly from the vendor's own page that day; 'official-indirect' = official source confirmed via search index / vendor blog but the live page could not be fetched directly; 'reported' = no published list price exists — a commonly cited market figure, clearly flagged, never dressed as a list price.

chatgpt_business.label: ChatGPT Business
chatgpt_business.billing: billed monthly (US$20/seat on an annual plan; 2+ seats)
chatgpt_business.source: help.openai.com / chatgpt.com/pricing via search index (vendor pages blocked direct fetch, 2026-07-10; reflects the 2026-04-02 price cut)

chatgpt_enterprise.label: ChatGPT Enterprise
chatgpt_enterprise.billing: no published price — negotiated; commonly reported ~US$60/seat at ~150-seat minimum, annual contract
chatgpt_enterprise.source: third-party reporting (inference.net, spendhound.com, 2026-07-10); OpenAI's official position is 'contact sales'

claude_team.label: Claude Team (standard seat)
claude_team.billing: billed monthly (US$20/seat on an annual plan; teams of 5–150)

gemini_workspace_standard.label: Google Workspace Business Standard (Gemini included)
gemini_workspace_standard.billing: per seat, annual commitment (Gemini bundled since Jan 2025 — no separate Gemini seat price exists)
gemini_workspace_standard.source: workspace.google.com Jan-2025 announcement (US$14 figure is official; the live pricing page geolocates to AUD, 2026-07-10)
